description_long: This is a double-decker sightseeing bus, prominently painted in bright red with large, bold white text reading 'New York Sightseeing' along its sides. The bus features open-top upper seating, allowing passengers to enjoy unobstructed views of the city, and is adorned with iconic imagery such as the Statue of Liberty and city landmarks. The lower deck has large, rectangular windows for visibility and natural light, while the upper deck is lined with safety railings. The bus has six wheels, three on each side, and multiple entry/exit doors for passenger convenience. Branding from 'Grey Line' is visible on the front and sides, and the bus is designed for urban tours, accommodating a high volume of passengers. The overall structure is robust, with a hard, glossy exterior finish and clear signage for easy identification.
description: A red double-decker New York sightseeing bus with open-top upper seating, bold city-themed graphics, and prominent Grey Line branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bus's destination sign, Grey Line branding, and the main windshield.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the bus, open-top seating, large 'New York Sightseeing' text, and the Statue of Liberty graphic.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back signage, rear lights, and additional branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible entry doors, open-top seating, and city-themed graphics.
attribute_window_arrangement: Large rectangular windows are evenly spaced along both sides of the lower deck, separated by vertical pillars, with no windows on the upper open-top deck.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: Grey Line logo is visible on the front and sides, featuring a blue oval with white text.
